name: Surprise Strawberry Meringue Pie- Pjxg05a
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Crush crackers fine (easiest to do in a food processor).
3. Add baking powder and mix well. Set aside.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff, not dry.
5. Gradually beat in sugar with the egg whites.
6. When whites hold stiff peaks, fold in vanilla, pecans, and crumbs, mixing well.
7. Pour mixture into a well-buttered 9-inch pie plate.
8. Bake for 30 minutes until golden brown and firm.
9. Let cool.
10. Garnish with whipped cream and strawberries.
